description:
You are a machine-learning engineer who just received a small raw CSV file and have to prepare it for model training.

    Existing file:
    • /home/user/data/raw/customers.csv

    Goal:
    1. Read the raw file and extract only the “id” and “age” columns in that exact order.
    2. Preserve the header row (lower-case, exactly id,age) and keep the remaining rows sorted by id in ascending order.
    3. Save the resulting 2-column file to:
       /home/user/data/processed/customers_clean.csv
    4. Produce a simple one-shot log file summarizing the transformation at:
       /home/user/data/processed/transform.log

    Exact verification rules for the automated grader:

    A) /home/user/data/processed/customers_clean.csv
       • Must exist.
       • Must have exactly 5 lines.
       • Line-by-line content (with the literal comma “,” as separator and a Unix newline “\n” after each line):

         1) id,age
         2) 1,31
         3) 2,25
         4) 3,35
         5) 4,28

       • No extra spaces, tabs, or blank lines are allowed.

    B) /home/user/data/processed/transform.log
       • Must exist.
       • Must contain exactly two lines, each terminated by a Unix newline:
         1) Transformation completed successfully
         2) Records processed: 4

    Notes & Constraints:
    • Create the /home/user/data/processed directory if it does not yet exist; do not remove /home/user/data/raw.
    • You will not have root privileges, so only use commands writable by you.
    • You may solve the task any way you like (cut, awk, csvtool, Python, etc.), but the two output files must match the format above byte-for-byte.
    • Do not echo or print the target file contents in the terminal; just create the files on disk.
    • The entire task can be completed with no more than two or three shell commands or a brief one-shot script.
truth:
Initial filesystem state (before the agent starts):
    └── /home/user/data/raw/customers.csv
        Contents (each line ends with '\n'):
        id,name,age,country
        1,Alice,31,US
        2,Bob,25,CA
        3,Charlie,35,UK
        4,David,28,US

    Required final filesystem state (after correct completion):
    1. /home/user/data/processed directory exists.

    2. /home/user/data/processed/customers_clean.csv
       Exact content including trailing newlines:
       id,age\n
       1,31\n
       2,25\n
       3,35\n
       4,28\n

    3. /home/user/data/processed/transform.log
       Exact content including trailing newlines:
       Transformation completed successfully\n
       Records processed: 4\n
